creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Reproducible with a more recent version of CURRENT? 

uname -aKU


(In reply to Jonas Lopes from comment #0)

> … the WiFi network. It looks like it's connected, but it doesn't work; …

Can you describe the non-working state in any detail? 


(In reply to Jonas Lopes from comment #1)

I guess that you forced off the power some time after the second 18:21:06 event, true?
